title: The Mysterious Classmate
overview: Sakura Mamiya is a high school student who can see spirits. Her seat in class is next to Rinne Rokudo, who for some reason, most people can see only sometimes. Sakura's friend is troubled by a series of bizarre phone calls. Sakura and Rinne investigate.

title: Memories of the Red Ring
overview: The people at school have a dream about being approached by a woman in a kimono in a strange world with a with a red ring, imploring them to make an offering to the instrument shelter.

title: Freak of the Club Building
overview: A huge, monstrous cat attacks from the sky. To Sakura's shock, her friends Miho and Rika can see it, too.

title: If You Don't Mind Starting as Friends
overview: The sun of a family of exorcists, Tsubasa Jumonji, has come to school. Right off the bat, he asks out his first love, Sakura! This bothers Rinne, but he turns a cold shoulder towards Sakura.

title: Hanako-san
overview: Being broke, Rinne is overjoyed about a job Rokumon brought him: to hunt down an evil spirit for 100,000 yen. Meanwhile, something ghostly is going on at school.

title: Voices of the Roadside Shrine
overview: On her way home from school, Sakura hears the voice of a child asking from help from a roadside shrine. She wants to talk to Rinne about it, but Rinne is busy helping mummy-like Taro.

title: Curse of the Rabbit Hutch
overview: Sakura spots the spirit of a boy who'd rammed his head into a lamp post be taken away by a boy with bat wings. The next morning, Rinne and Sakura receive a bizarre request letter, but Suzu and Tomoya, who'd also been called there.

title: Welcome to Hell!
overview: In an effort to rescue Reiji's living spirit, Rinne chases Masato to Hell, where right off the bat he's forced to enter illegally, as he can't pay for the admission fee.

title: The Wig's Disappointment and the Pumpkin's Temptation
overview: Rinne's school holds their school festival. Rinne works at the cafe with Sakura, when they sense something ominous. Just then, a blonde wig flies at them.

title: Damashigami Company
overview: Rinne has come down with an afterlife strain of the flu. A doctor arrives to treat him, but it turns out that he's a Damashigami.

title: The Young President's Induction!
overview: Sakura, Rokumon and Tsubasa infiltrate Damashigami Company. In an effort to take down the company, Rinne challenges Sabato to a duel.

title: Ageha the Shinigami
overview: Rika gets 100% on a test using a mechanical pencil that makes her smarter, but an ominous aura comes from the pencil.

title: Naggy
overview: In a daze after having seen Rinne and Ageha holding hands, Sakura accidentally wanders into the Reidou. She's surrounded by Damashigamis, but Rinne saves her at the last second.

title: It's Not a Date!
overview: Sakura finds the spirit of an idol by the pool, but she doesn't want to bring it up with Rinne; she's still bothered by what happened between him and Ageha.

title: Just a Thank You
overview: Rinne tries to set things straight with Sakura about Ageha. Every time he tries to talk to her, he gets interrupted. Something odd comes out of the bento box that Ageha gives him.

title: Memories of the Haunted Cedar
overview: Tsubasa invites Sakura to visit a huge tree at the elementary school where they met, but there's something not right about the tree.

title: Curse of the Power Stone
overview: Tsubasa is upset: Rinne keeps getting between him and Sakura. But Masato the devil appears before him, offering what appears to be a solution.

title: Kain the Shirushigami
overview: During her pursuit of the Damashigami, Ageha encounters a Shirushigami named Kain. She goes crying to Rinne after he mocks her and her sister.

title: In the Box
overview: Sakura and the others are trapped in a shed at Kain's home. There they find a suspicious box bearing, but they need Rinne to open it, and he's busy fighting Kain.

title: A Home Without Spirits
overview: Sakura notices something odd when she gets home: there are spirits passing through her house.

title: M's Tragedy
overview: It's bonus season at the Mortal Census Bureau where Kain works. Kain is tasked with delivering the money, but it gets stolen along the way.

title: Merry Christmas in the Derelict
overview: Ageha goes shopping to prepare for an intimate Christmas with Rinne, but on her way home, she notices an ominous aura coming from an abandoned house.

title: Fox Trap
overview: When Tsubasa catches a cold, Rinne, Sakura, Rokumon, and Kain pay him a visit.

title: Spirited Ramen
overview: The weather turns chilly, signalling the start of the perfect season for ramen.

title: Target: Sakura
overview: Sakura gets an experimental candy which can render her unable to see spirits and immediately tries it out.

title: Black Cat Oboro
overview: Ageha doesn't get along with her black cat contractor, Oboro. They fight.

title: Court of Dreams
overview: A spirit is unable to pass on, held back by a desire to play tennis in the school tennis club.

title: The Missing Membership Fee
overview: Rinne's shinigami union payments go missing. Shirushigami Kain threatens him with late charges.

title: Song of Love
overview: A spirit who passed away in the Showa era returns, causing trouble all around the neighborhood.

title: Digging Up Memories, Can I Borrow Cash?, Demon at the Camp Grounds
overview: Rinne's grandma cleans her house, and digs up some goodies. Rinne's Dad is broke again. A demon tries to take one of Sakura's friends' brothers to Hell.

title: Homestay Trainee
overview: Rinne's homestay, Shouma, is quite a handful. Hoping to end his school assignment quickly, he goes after an evil spirit, but the spirit appears elsewhere as a living human being.

title: Coaching Responsibilities
overview: Masato tricks Rinne's homestay, Shouma, into turning spirits evil. Both Rinne and Shouma are in deep trouble.

title: The Cursed Straw Doll
overview: A spirit is wandering around the steps of a local shrine. She'd died trying to curse Mamiya and Sakura's homeroom teacher, Suzuki-sensei

title: Mikazukido for All Your Scythe Needs
overview: Rinne's Shinigami Scythe needs sharpening. He's invited to Mikazukido, a scythe smith that goes back generations -- but they kind of suck.

title: Black Cat 6th Dan
overview: Rokumon and the other black cats are invited to the celebration of a high-profile black cat before his reincarnation. Meanwhile, Rinne does battle with a hobo moth who threatens to make him even poorer.

title: Monsters of the Summer Festival
overview: It's summer festival season. Rokudou doesn't have money to spend on such fun. Instead, he investigates rumors of "Dancing People."

title: Ghost Boat / Something in the Tunnel / Welcome to Nehan-ya
overview: Sakura and her friends head to the beach, where they run into Rinne, Ageha, Tsubasa and Rokumon. They investigate a ghost boat, an octopus monster and a section of the beach rumored to be filled with spirits.

title: The Mysterious Transfer Student
overview: Shima Renge is a new student at school. She has a habit of breaking people's hearts -- possibly on purpose.

title: Renge's Revenge
overview: Shima Renge's self-imposed community service work hurts Rinne's weather box business, leaving him terrifyingly poor.

title: Recovery Cream / Rumors / Mushroom Hunting
overview: Mikazukido's Recovery Cream can fix anything -- including cats. There's a spirit in the staff storage at school. The black cats go on a trip hunting for magic mushrooms.

title: Break-up Kit
overview: Ageha tries to break-up Rinne and Sakura with an arsenal of Shinigami tools. Renge gets involved, in an attempt to have it all blow up in Ageha's face.

title: Shinigami Elementary School Reunion
overview: Demon Masato gets involved his wings stolen by a mysterious man who seems to be trying to lure Rinne into the Shinigami Elementary School reunion.

title: Black Cat Ranking Exam
overview: Rokumon enters the Black Cat Ranking Exam in pursuit of a ranked black cat contractor discount. Kain and Ageha also have their black cat contractors join. Calamity ensues.

title: MVC
overview: Rokumon's plan to get the key to the Shinigami door backfires, but he gets his reward. The exam heats up even more.

title: Hot Pot Boss, Demon Type-A, Shinigami Type-B
overview: Rokumon's plan to get the key to the Shinigami door backfires, but he gets his reward. The exam heats up even more.

title: Have My Scarf, Waiting on the Rink
overview: A bossy evil spirit and a bossy Tsubasa nearly crash an oden party Ageha sets up for Rinne. Masato and Rinne are both sick with afterworld strains of influenza. They engage in a glorious coughing battle.

title: Never Change...
overview: Renge does everything in her power -- and then some -- to stop her crush, Shirushigami Kain, from finding out that she's a Damashigami.

title: Shinigami Sakura?!
overview: Sakura picks up a scythe that becomes attached to her until she can successfully purify seven spirits.

title: Matsugo Returns?!
overview: Ageha tries to put Rinne on a collar. Rinne's friend from elementary school, Matsugo, is not amused. Sakura, on the other hand, sees an opportunity.

title: Sakura's Wager
overview: At their faux date, Sakura overhears Rinne saying he likes her because she feeds him and lends him money. He tries to clear things up with her, but Matsugo has his own ideas.

title: Gold License
overview: When Sabato gets caught distributing fake Shinigami Gold licenses, Rinne discovers that his father might have been a genius Shinigami in high school!

title: The Cursed Ace / Draw Me
overview: A ghost hand seems to have a grudge against a member of the track team. Later, Sakura discovers a mysterious female spirit who demands art students to draw her face.

title: Wheel of Reincarnation Cleanup Day / Infinite Malice / A Puppy in the Rain
overview: Rinne and the other Shinigami are tasked with cleaning the Wheel of Reincarnation. The dangerous work only gets worse when a brawl breaks out, and Damashigami enter the scene.

title: Ane at the Shopping Mall
overview: Sakura meets a fortune teller who illegally possesses a Shinigami tool. Rinne goes to collect it, but the fortune teller won't give up her crystal ball without a fight.

title: Kuroboshi Sansei / The Lucky Pot / Bamboo Shoot in Rainbow Color
overview: Tamako asks Rinne to train a young black cat to support a Shinigami, but this cat's particular phobia gets in the way. Later, Rinne hopes to intercept a "lucky" pot of money!

title: Special Protected Sacred Bird / June Bride / The Safe from Hell
overview: Shoma offers to pay Rinne handsomely to take care of a sacred bird, forgetting to mention the bird's frightening appetite. Later, Sakura meets the ghost of an angry bride.

title: Wandering Power Stone / Poltergeist / The Taboo in the Shinigami World
overview: Jumonji finally gets a chance to impress Sakura when he tries to quell a mischievous spirit. Later, Sakura and Rinne help a "creepy" spirit give the performance of his life.

title: Open After Seven Days / Silver Scythe / Prince of the Shinigami
overview: A cursed doll from Ageha's past comes to haunt Renge. Later, Rinne helps a spirit by setting her up on a date with Matsugo, despite Matsugo's lingering affections for Rinne!

title: Apologize in the Altar Room / Goddess of Wisdom / River of Treasure
overview: Sabato falls victim to the mackerel curse! Later, Jumonji invites Sakura to study for a test at his place, only to have his alone time with her horribly interrupted.

title: The First Union Meeting / An Ominous Prophecy
overview: Someone is trying to take over the Damashigami Company! Later, when Renge tries to steal Annette's Peep Ball, she sees a vision of Kain... putting handcuffs on her?

title: Mystery of the Flower Field / I Will Lend You My Right Arm / Black Report Card
overview: A search for Kain goes awry as Ageha and Matsugo continue to fight for Rinne's affection. Later, Sakura notices that Rinne, who never studies, is passing every test. How?

title: Evil Spirit in the Summer House / Eggplant Romance / One Coin Investigation
overview: Rinne tries to purify a poltergeist, and Sakura helps a spirit who's scared of eggplants. Later, the group takes a trip to a festival to bust a Damashigami scheme.

title: Otome the Shinigami
overview: While visiting a pawn shop Rinne discovers something related to his mother, and learns more about her. Later, Sakura and Rinne check on a little girl who can see spirits.

title: Lies and Truth
overview: Sabato reveals an interesting detail concerning the disappearance of Rinne's mother, leading the others to a startling revelation about little Ichigo's true identity.

title: Kokkuri-san / Cursed Piggy Bank / The Hated Sansei
overview: Ichigo asks Rinne to banish "Kokkuri-san". Sabato tries to offload a cursed piggy bank. Later, Sansei makes another attempt to fight his fear of spirits.

title: Curse of Splurge / The Cursed Peep Ball
overview: Stingy Annette finds herself suddenly unable to save money. Is it truly a snake spirit's curse? Later, Masato attempts to sabotage Rinne's happiness... again.

title: Head Man / When You Wish Upon the Moon / The First Saury Festival
overview: Refuto hires Rinne to protect an offering of delicious dumplings. Later, Rinne looks forward to a Saury Festival... with one hidden condition.

title: The Practical Training for Capturing a Dream Demon
overview: Rinne's dreams are being invaded by a Dream Demon. To stop the madness, Rinne and Matsugo have to capture a it in a world where one person's dream is another's nightmare!

title: Nothing Inside / Mystery of Koshikudake Hill / Effect of the Matsutake Mushroom
overview: Incidents around steamed buns make life difficult for Rinne and Rokumon. Later, Rinne experiences a problem originating from a mysterious package of mushrooms.

title: Wings of Celebration / Kabakichi-kun / Scream of a Cassette Tape
overview: Something terrible has happened to Matsugo: he's turned into an angel! Worse, he's HELPING people! Later, Sakura and Ichigo bump into Shoma as he tries to help a hippo spirit.

title: Black Square Thing / Shortcut Through the Alley
overview: Rinne is suspected of stealing money at his own school! On the hunt to find the actual perpetrator, he discovers how little faith his friends have in him and his poverty.

title: A Ring and Stamp / Food at the Porch / Black Cat Children’s Association
overview: Ageha has one last chance to stop her sister from making the biggest mistake of her life: marrying Sabato! Later, Rinne discovers that Rokumon may have a secret food supply.

title: Good Luck Wax / Maneko and Kotomi / Where’s My Money?!
overview: The new wax finish on Rinne's scythe is attracting coins! Later, Sakura helps her friends Miho and Rika when a walking mannequin attacks them.

title: Supplemental Class for Fierce Dog Catching / Money Spirit / Evil Spirit’s Legacy
overview: Sakura finds herself dealing with a fierce dog spirit... but is he really a dog? Later, Rinne wonders if his never ending money problems can be solved by a money spirit.

title: A Promise in the Underworld
overview: Matsugo invites Rinne to his school festival, so (of course) Sakura, Jumonji, and Renge come along. The festival's ghost-house proves more dangerous than they thought.
